name: Global Interactive Technologies, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview Global Interactive Technologies, Inc. (the Company), a Delaware corporation formerly known as Hanryu Holdings, Inc., is a technology-driven platform company connecting global fans of Korean culture through innovative digital experiences. The Company operates Faning, a comprehensive interactive platform designed to facilitate content discovery, monetization, user-generated content, and deep community engagement among global fandom communities.
